subject: english
topic_title: Vocabulary Development: Printing and Mass Media
learning_objectives: Define selected printing and media terms
Distinguish between related terms such as libel and slander

sections.heading: Relevant Words
sections.content: The note includes editorial, book pirate, copyright, royalty, imprint, cartoon, column, obituary, corrigendum, broadcast, signal, broadcaster, freelance journalist, reportage, slander, libel, masthead, dateline, manuscript, editor, correspondent, caricature, cartoonist, advertorial, plagiarism, proof read, and offset.

sections.heading: Selected Clarifications
sections.content: Libel is written or pictorial defamation, while slander is spoken defamation. A corrigendum is a correction issued after publication. An advertorial is an advertisement presented in the style of an editorial.
